subcodes.title: Tasbih-i-Fatimih
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He whose essential Reality none knoweth, and whose pure Being none can fathom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله العلی العظیم. اسبح سبحان الذی لا یعلم جوهو وجود کیف هو و لا مجرد موجود این
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @impossibility of true worship of God, @chastisement and requital, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Night of Power (Laylat al-Qadr)
